data.title: Eigen Labs teams up with Linea to boost Ethereum with cutting-edge solutions like restaking and EigenCloud, reinforcing security and utility.
data.description: Eigen Labs, a prominent participant in Ethereum's infrastructure, has teamed up with Linea to improve network security and usability. This collaboration aims to introduce innovative technologies such as restaking and EigenCloud. This partnership is significant for the Ethereum ecosystem as Eigen Labs plays a vital role in enhancing its functionality and security.

data.title: Cohu's Eclipse platform selected by leading U.S. semiconductor manufacturer for testing next-gen processor devices.
data.description: In Poway, California, Cohu, Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU), a worldwide provider of equipment and services enhancing semiconductor manufacturing yield and efficiency, disclosed that its Eclipse platform was chosen by a prominent American semiconductor manufacturer and foundry services entity for testing next-gen processor devices in production. The Eclipse systems, featuring Cohu’s exclusive T-Core Active Thermal Control (ATC) technology, aim to boost yield by ensuring highly accurate thermal control.

data.title: Parafin and Gusto launch Payroll Bridge, offering small businesses a line of credit to cover payroll; Gusto serves 400,000 businesses.
data.description: In San Francisco, Parafin, a top provider of embedded financing, has revealed a significant collaboration with Gusto, a prominent platform for small businesses overseeing payroll, HR, and benefits, catering to over 400,000 businesses. This partnership has led to the introduction of Payroll Bridge, operated by Parafin, providing a line of credit specifically for covering payroll expenses. Given that payroll stands as a critical and time-sensitive financial obligation for numerous small businesses, experiencing a transient shortfall in cash flow can have substantial repercussions.

Wall Street hit fresh records as Fed rate cuts fueled rallies across all major indexes, with tech and small caps leading gains. Nvidia’s $5B Intel investment boosted sentiment, but analysts warn high valuations and reliance on Big Tech leave markets vulnerable.

data.title: UDR declares quarterly dividend on common stock for 3rd quarter of 2025 at $0.43 per share, payable on Oct 31, 2025 to shareholders.
data.description: In Denver, UDR, Inc., a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust trading on the NYSE under the symbol UDR, disclosed the declaration of a regular quarterly dividend for the third quarter of 2025. The dividend amount is set at $0.43 per share and will be distributed in cash on October 31, 2025, to shareholders of UDR common stock as of the record date, October 9, 2025. This upcoming dividend marks the 212th consecutive quarterly dividend paid by UDR on its common stock.

data.title: ivWatch appoints new leadership team to drive growth, including board members & President. Based in Newport News, VA.
data.description: A company specializing in IV safety, ivWatch, LLC, based in Newport News, Virginia, revealed the addition of key healthcare leaders to its board and an expansion of its executive team on September 18, 2025. This move is aimed at fast-tracking the commercialization of their groundbreaking IV monitoring technology. The company's actions indicate a significant step forward in their business strategy, with a focus on leveraging prominent industry expertise to drive growth and innovation in the medical field.

data.title: Neogen® Corp (NASDAQ: NEOG) to release Q1 earnings on Oct 9, 2025. Conference call at 8:00 am Eastern time to discuss results.
data.description: Neogen® Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) is set to release its first-quarter earnings on October 9, 2025, before the market opens. Company executives will conduct a webcast and conference call at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to review the financial results. To join the conference call, participants can dial toll-free 1-800-549-8228 for North America or (+1) 646-564-2877 for international callers using the conference ID: 49915. Additionally, a live webcast will be available for access during the event.

data.title: Tanger (NYSE: SKT) to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 4 after market close; conference call scheduled for Nov 5 at 8:30AM ET.
data.description: Greensboro, North Carolina - Tanger® (NYSE: SKT), a prominent owner and manager of outlet and open-air retail shopping centers, disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2025, on Tuesday, November 4, 2025, post-market closure. The company plans to conduct a conference call for analysts, investors, and other stakeholders on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can join the call by dialing the provided number.

data.title: Learn tabular data techniques from Kaggle Grandmasters: GPU acceleration, diverse baselines, feature engineering. Enhance data modeling! (Read More)
data.description: Learn about the tactics employed by the top Kaggle Grandmasters to excel in handling tabular data, with a focus on utilizing GPU acceleration, employing a range of baseline models, and implementing advanced feature engineering. These strategies are shown to significantly improve the accuracy and efficiency of real-world data modeling processes. For more in-depth insights, continue reading.

data.title: NVIDIA Dynamo addresses AI inference memory bottlenecks with KV Cache offloading, boosting efficiency for large models.
data.description: NVIDIA Dynamo has unveiled a new feature called KV Cache offloading to combat memory bottlenecks in AI inference. This innovation aims to boost efficiency and lower costs for large language models by offloading cache operations. The introduction of this feature is set to significantly improve performance and reduce expenses for organizations utilizing AI technology.

data.title: Adam Stewart discusses Sandals and Beaches Resorts' all-inclusive evolution at Skift Global Forum in Jamaica on Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: Adam Stewart, the Executive Chairman of Sandals and Beaches Resorts, discussed the ongoing development of the all-inclusive experience provided by the resorts in Jamaica on September 18, 2025. At the Skift Global Forum, Stewart highlighted the resorts' history of innovation and progress.

data.title: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) to distribute $0.023000 per unit on October 15, 2025 to holders.
data.description: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) declared a cash distribution of $0.023000 per beneficial unit, scheduled for payment on October 15, 2025. Unitholders as of September 30, 2025, will be eligible to receive the distribution. The calculation is based on oil production in June 2025 and natural gas production in May 2025, with accrued costs from July 2025 factored in.

data.title: TechnipFMC to announce Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 23; conference call at 1:30pm London time (8:30am NY time). Webcast available.
data.description: TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) is set to hold its Q3 2025 earnings conference call on Thursday, October 23, 2025. The call is scheduled for 1:30 p.m. London time (8:30 a.m. New York time). Prior to the call, a press release with the financial results will be issued around 11:45 a.m. London time (6:45 a.m. New York time). The live webcast of the event can be accessed through the Investor Relations website or by registering in advance. For those unable to join live, a replay of the webcast will be available later.
Hess Midstream LP updates its guidance for the upcoming fiscal year.

data.title: Trane Technologies releases AI controls and ARIA to optimize buildings, improve energy efficiency up to 30%. Holly Paeper discloses 30% inefficiency in commercial buildings.
data.description: Trane Technologies, a global climate innovator listed on NYSE under symbol TT, made a significant announcement in Swords, Ireland. The company unveiled two major advancements - AI Control and ARIA - aimed at enhancing building optimization and energy management. President of Commercial HVAC Americas at Trane Technologies, Holly Paeper, shared that after conducting numerous energy audits in commercial buildings, they found that most operate at about 30% inefficiency. These new developments are poised to revolutionize the industry and improve energy efficiency on a large scale.

data.title: DIH Holding US, Inc. notified by Nasdaq of additional staff determination letter.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is experiencing a slowdown with a projected growth rate of 3.2%, down from the previous forecast of 3.6%. This dip is attributed to various factors including trade tensions, geopolitical uncertainties, and subdued investment. The manufacturing sector is particularly affected, with growth expected to drop to 2.7% globally. Emerging markets are also feeling the impact, with growth in these economies projected at 4.1%, a significant decrease from earlier estimates. The report highlights the need for policymakers to implement measures to boost economic activity and restore confidence in the markets. It is imperative for countries to address these challenges collectively to prevent further decline in global growth.

data.title: Butterfly Network (NYSE: BFLY) named to TIME's World's Top HealthTech Companies 2025 list, recognizing leading innovators.
data.description: Butterfly Network, Inc., a digital health company known for its handheld, whole-body ultrasound technology, has been listed in the inaugural edition of the World’s Top HealthTech Companies 2025. This prestigious ranking, presented by TIME and Statista Inc., a prominent industry ranking provider, highlights Butterfly Network's innovative contributions to healthcare. The company, traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BFLY, continues to revolutionize care with its advanced ultrasound technology. The World’s Top HealthTech Companies 2025 distinction acknowledges Butterfly Network as a frontrunner in driving progress in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Lumen Technologies to livestream Industry Analyst Forum on September 23. Check investor website for details.
data.description: Lumen announced that they will be livestreaming the Industry Analyst Forum on September 23. The livestream details are available on the company's investor website.

data.title: Leslie Doggett Auto Group buys Russell & Smith Ford, Honda dealerships, and top 5 Ford/Honda parts business.
data.description: In an exciting development on September 18, 2025, the Leslie Doggett Auto Group revealed their successful acquisition of Russell & Smith Ford, Honda, and Collision Center operations. This acquisition also includes ownership of one of the leading wholesale Ford and Honda parts distribution businesses in the nation. This significant milestone positions the Leslie Doggett Auto Group strongly in the automotive industry. Located a mere mile away from the previous site, this strategic move promises promising growth opportunities for the group.

data.title: Power Solutions Int'l names Zhaoying Du as General Counsel & Corporate Secretary on Sept 15, 2025, earlier effective on Sept 8.
data.description: In Wood Dale, Illinois, on September 18, 2025, Power Solutions International, Inc. revealed that Zhaoying (Dorothy) Du has been appointed as the General Counsel and Corporate Secretary by the Board of Directors on September 15, 2025. The appointment was effective as of September 8, 2025.
